text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yay! I did it! I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I feel like I've taken another step forward!
choice_data_list:
Don't get complacent. Set your sights on the
next race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I feel like I've taken another step forward!
choice_data_list:
Don't get complacent. Set your sights on the
next race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't all me. I couldn't have done this without
your support!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"Walk as two, leave footprints of four!" I hope
you'll continue to guide and support me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Or in greater words, "always wash your
signature racewear after a victory!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone else will be putting their best foot
forward, so I must do the same!
